headline: Bernstein Cuts AT&T, Verizon, T-Mobile Price Targets Amid Starlink Threat
summary: Bernstein cut price targets on AT&T, T-Mobile and Verizon on views Elon Musk's Starlink poses a competitive threat. SpaceX stock fell.

raw.headline: Bernstein Cuts AT&T, Verizon, T-Mobile Price Targets Amid Starlink Threat

headline: The Cash Machine The Market Put On Sale: VZ
summary: The market is offering a startlingly high cash return to own this telecom giant, forcing a hard look at whether the offer is a bargain or a trap.

raw.headline: The Cash Machine The Market Put On Sale: VZ
raw.summary: The market is offering a startlingly high cash return to own this telecom giant, forcing a hard look at whether the offer is a bargain or a trap.

headline: M+C Saatchi NA launches entertainment arm as branded content booms
summary: Jen Bacchus, a former WME executive, is leading the specialized offering that aims to help clients drive deeper cultural relevance.

headline: Zip Opens New York City Hub, Plans to Double Local Team
summary: SAN FRANCISCO & NEW YORK, July 13, 2026--Zip opens NYC hub in former Twitter building; flagship Zip Forward conference debuts in NYC this fall with speakers from Visa, Shopify, and Uber
